details.test: Task 1: Cheapest hosting plan (>=50GB, <=$40) added to cart and checkout summary
Task 2: Video production quote request for 90-second promo under $8,000
Task 3: Book earliest 30-minute online website redesign consultation
Task 4: Build marketing bundle (SEO, social, blog) under $900 and request proposal
Task 5: Find retail case study using IT support & video production and contact sales
Task 6: Save most recent cloud backup help article to reading list
Task 7: Submit high-priority support ticket for email migration issue
Task 8: Start free trial of most affordable RMM plan for >=25 devices under $600
